name: TXNM Energy, Inc.
description: TXNM Energy, Inc. is an energy holding company based in Albuquerque, New Mexico, that provides electricity and electric services through its regulated utility subsidiaries, Public Service Company of New Mexico (PNM) and Texas-New Mexico Power Company (TNMP). Serving approximately 800,000 homes and businesses across New Mexico and Texas, the company is committed to delivering reliable energy while pursuing a clean and sustainable energy future. Formerly known as PNM Resources, TXNM Energy focuses on regulated utility operations and maintains a strong commitment to environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and robust corporate governance practices.
